description_long: This is a modern, luxury bungalow with a flat roof and expansive glass windows, set within a landscaped lot featuring palm trees and manicured lawns. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, with the front facade dominated by large floor-to-ceiling windows and a covered entryway. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious patio area with a swimming pool and a row of sun loungers, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of smooth concrete and glass, with dark trim and accents providing a sleek, contemporary look. The property is enclosed by a low retaining wall, and the driveway leads to a covered garage area. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, natural light, and seamless integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed luxury bungalow with large glass windows, landscaped grounds, and a backyard pool area. The design features sleek concrete and glass finishes, with open living spaces and a strong indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, landscaped lawn, and driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, palm trees, and the transition from the driveway to the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, sun loungers, patio, and extensive glass facade opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side lawn, and the connection between the front and rear outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
